title: endostemon scabridus
intro: Endostemon scabridus, also known as the Rough Endostemon, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Endostemon scabridus include reducing fever, alleviating sore throats, and easing congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
